feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Different steps involved in execution of a T-code.
entry.content:
Whenever we execute a T-code the below sequence of steps will be executed.
 
1. The SAP will check whether the T-code is given by the user is valid or not using the table TSTC.
   If the T-code is valid then it will proceed to 2nd step otherwise SAP system will throw a message 
   saying that the T-code is not valid one.
 
2. In this step the system will check whether T-code has been locked or not.
   If the T-code is locked then the system will throw a error message saying that T-code is locked using
   SM01 T-code. If the T-code has not been locked then it will proceed to next step. 
 
3.In this step the system will check whether the user buffer contains all the authorizations for executing
  the T-code . If the user buffer contains the authorization then it will proceed to next step.
 
  Sometime even though the user having the corresponding role he is not executing the T-code in that cases we can go
  resetting the user buffer.
 
4. In this step the system will check whether the auth. object S_TCODE contains all the field value as a transaction.
   If the T-code is present then it is going to display the initial screen for the T-code.
 
5. Once we get the initial screen if we want to perform anything we need the corresponding authorization values in the user profile.

entry.title: Flexible column layout in SAP MDK as Navigation and Display Page
entry.content:
Hi,

I'd like to know, if it's possible to somehow use the flexible column layout in the following way, since the app would only be used on tablets:

The left (start) page should be sort of a navigation page to jump to certain elements (divisions) on the right side. Here's a picture of how I would like it to be in the emulator:

I tried doing that with the cross navigation action and each button navigating to a different page, but the page on the right side should be one long form and not many single pages for each division.

 

I also couldn't find anything about the use of jumpTo() to e.g. scroll back to the top of a page? I guess it failed cause I can't scroll to an object, but how else would I do it? Here's my failed attempt:

 

export default function jumpToFC(clientAPI) {
    let scrollDestination = clientAPI.getPageProxy().getControl('SectionedTable0').getSection('SectionFormCell0');
    scrollDestination.scrollTo(0,0);   
}

 

SAP.MDKClient: 19-06-2024 13:39:17.912 [main] ERROR SAP.MDKClient - TypeError: scrollDestination.scrollTo is not a function TypeError: scrollDestination.scrollTo is not a function

 Thanks in advance for any kind of help 🙂

 

Greetings

Markus

entry.title: Search Help Exit with own Selection and Dialog to choose a Value returning blank values
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a TMG, choose "new entries", enter something in field Tablename and Fieldname, click enter jump to field VALUE and press F4.

Now my search help exit comes into the game: Here I get searchhelp name based on of the field which I have selected in TMG dynamically through get parameters. Now I'm using this search help to determine (that's not SH for field VALUE!) valid value list for field VALUE, display it and let the user choose a value. Now my problem is when I'm clicking of F4 for the field VALUE, it shows 2 rows(Valid values for the selected field are yes and no) but the values in both the rows are blank. Please refer attached screenshot. Can someone please help in resolving this issue. How can see the list of values when I click on f4. Here is the code I have written in search help exit.

 

IF callcontrol-step = 'SELECT' OR callcontrol-step = 'DISP'.

GET PARAMETER ID 'SHLP' FIELD lv_shlp_name. " Getting SH of the field selected in TMG
IF sy-subrc EQ 0.

ls_shlp-shlpname = lv_shlp_name.
APPEND ls_shlp TO lt_shlp_name.

CALL FUNCTION 'GET_DOMAIN_VALUES'
EXPORTING
domname = ls_shlp-shlpname
text = 'X'
TABLES
values_tab = lt_valuestab
EXCEPTIONS
no_values_found = 1
OTHERS = 2.

IF sy-subrc EQ 0.

CALL FUNCTION 'F4UT_RESULTS_MAP'
EXPORTING
source_structure = lc_src
TABLES
shlp_tab = lt_shlp_name
record_tab = record_tab
source_tab = lt_valuestab
CHANGING
shlp = shlp
callcontrol = callcontrol
EXCEPTIONS
illegal_structure = 1
OTHERS = 2.

IF sy-subrc EQ 0.

LOOP AT lt_valuestab INTO DATA(ls_valtab).
ls_record_tab-string = ls_valtab-ddtext.
INSERT ls_record_tab INTO TABLE record_tab. "Pupulating record_tab manually as above function                                                                                         module returning 2 blank rows in results tab
ENDLOOP.

ENDIF.

ENDIF.

ENDIF.

entry.title: how to add on_click event to a Hyperlink in ALV report?
entry.content:
*method prepare_data
IF lt_fu_root IS NOT INITIAL.
              lt_fu_root_temp = lt_fu_root.
              <lfs_output>-tor_id_fu = VALUE #( lt_fu_root_temp[ tor_cat = lc_fu ]-tor_id OPTIONAL ).

* Shipment tracking link
              CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_OUTPUT'
                EXPORTING
                  input  = <lfs_output>-tor_id_fu
                IMPORTING
                  output = lv_tor_id_fu_ext.

              " Concatenate the base link with the converted value
              CONCATENATE lc_link lv_tor_id_fu_ext INTO <lfs_output>-tracking_link.
            ENDIF.

I am a newbie in abap, Please help me to add the hyperlink's on click event so that when I click on the hyperlink in the report, it should direct to the browser. I have an existing report where inside method: prepare_data, I am fetching the hyperlink of this field in the final internal table.
Now, in the method: display_alv, 

Please help to add the on_click event here so that when i click on the link in the field "Tracking_link", the urls should be directing to a web browser.

entry.title: Change Company Code Currency after go live
entry.content:
Dear community,

One of my customers needs to change the company currency from its local currency to a stonger currency like EUR. The company is in production from long time ago.

I know that if we performe the changes, several inconsisitencies will comes up. Is there other workaround to do it without the system inconsistencies.?

Thankyou very much for your help.

entry.title: Material does not exist -Error Message no. VK056
entry.content:
Hi,

While creating material determination, cross selling, BOMs in s4HANA SD module, I am getting the error message- "Material does not exist" - Error Message no. VK056. In other SD transactions, it is working fine. Kindly help.

Thanks and regards,

S.G. Sekar

entry.title: sap ui5 code in the walkthrough in btp
entry.content:
sap ui5 code in the walkthrough in btp

 

How to develop the modified version of walkthrough? They have now taken out of web ide. Walkthrough Tutorial (JavaScript) - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK

entry.title: SAP REPORT QUERY
entry.content:
SALES ORDER NO. SALES ORDER DATECUSTOMER CODECUSTOMER CODEAR INVOICE NO.AR INVOICE NO.GAP DAYS BETWEEN ORDER DATE AND INVOICE DATE

NEED THIS TYPE OF REPORT QUERY IN SAP B1

entry.title: Generate PDF version of closed checklists
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I need help pls, i want to create a business rule that make me to Generate PDF version of closed checklist, i tryed this solution but always i had problem 

 

thank you

entry.title: In which relavant groups can I post about new job opportunities?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am new to this group and I would like to know which is the relevant group within SAP community to post SAP related jobs? We are currently hiring for Senior SAP FICO and Senior SAP PP Consultant for our HQ in HEIDENHEIM.

Best Regards,

Hansa

entry.title: Deactivating Multi-Year Budget execution in FM SAP
entry.content:
Hello dear community and SAP experts,

@iklovski @mar_novalbos 

I am currently working on a public sector client that has implemented the FM module with the multi-year budget functionality.

SAP Customizing Implementation Guide->Public Sector Management->Funds Management Government->Basic Settings->Activate Multi-Year Budget Execution

This customer wants to deactivate this functionality to perform the budget execution annually, i.e. control the budget annually and at the end of the fiscal year report the budget commitments to the new fiscal year (FMJ2). We already proposed to them to use the balance report with the FMVT transaction, but this does not fulfill the customer's requirement basically because the budget consumption is recorded in the year N-1.

My question is if it is possible to deactivate this functionality and what would be the impact of doing so?

Best regards,

Luis.

Multi-Year Budget Execution: Reporting | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: How do I extract data from SAP R/3 (4.7) ?
entry.content:
Hi,

As we are trying to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public) through staging tables, could you please suggest possible ways to extract data from version 4.7? We need to extract all fields and tables (both specified and unspecified/classified and non-classified) from R/3.

We have attempted to extract data using transaction code SE16N, but we couldn't extract all tables, especially the classified ones. By using transaction code RSO2 for custom data source creation, we managed to extract some data, but not all fields from the tables. Kindly suggest possible ways to achieve complete data extraction, including any other transaction codes that may be useful.

Thank you.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cash Management Exclude Flow Types
entry.content:
We have recently carried out an S/4HANA Bronwfield conversion for our customers and reconfigured the cash management system.

We are currently checking the data consistency in the old and new systems.

During the liquidity forecast, we noticed that the customs duty costs (Its a condition type) for a Purchase Order were included in the forecast under S/4HANA (TC: FF7BN).

In the old system (TC:FF7B), customs duty costs are not included in the liquidity forecast. So we have here a difference.

Is there a way to filter or exclude certain movement types / movement categories like 900021 which is the Flow Type for custom duty costs?

Thanks in advance

 

Best regards

entry.title: temu cupon code $100 off chile "{acr897367} or {frg227060}
entry.content:
Use Temu $100 off coupon code "{acr897367} or {frg227060}" and buy something that costs $100 or more, you'll get a $100 discount coupon bundle. You can also save up to 40% on your purchase and get free shipping with a special code.

When you're ready to check out, apply the Temu coupon code for existing customers "{acr897367} or {frg227060}" to get the $100 discount and up to 40% off your total purchase. This is the latest offer from Temu to help you save money while shopping with them.

 

For businesses operating in Brazil, navigating the complexities of tax regulations can be a challenge. A crucial aspect of this is complying with electronic invoicing, mandated by the Nota Fiscal Eletronica (NF-e) system. This article explores SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica, a solution designed to simplify NF-e compliance for SAP users.

Understanding NF-e
NF-e refers to the electronic invoice format used in Brazil for transactions involving goods. It eliminates paper invoices, promoting tax efficiency and streamlining the invoicing process. Companies must generate NF-e in a specific XML format, containing details like buyer and seller information, product specifics, and tax data.

SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica: A Helping Hand
SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica is a software solution offered by SAP that aids businesses in complying with NF-e regulations. It integrates seamlessly with existing SAP systems, automating manual tasks and ensuring accurate invoice generation.

Key Benefits of SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica
Enhanced Compliance: The solution automates NF-e generation in the mandated XML format, minimizing errors and ensuring compliance with Brazilian tax authorities (SEFAZ).
Streamlined Processes: Manual data entry for invoices is significantly reduced, saving time and resources.
Improved Accuracy: Automating invoice creation reduces the risk of errors associated with manual data entry.
Secure Communication: Secure and certified communication with SEFAZ is facilitated through the solution.
Efficiency Gains: Faster invoice processing translates to quicker settlements and improved cash flow.
Important Note: Upcoming End of Maintenance"

It's important to be aware that SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica (SAP NFE) is an on-premise solution nearing its end-of-maintenance date (December 31, 2025). SAP recommends exploring alternative solutions to ensure continued compliance with evolving NF-e regulations.

Companies must generate NF-e in a specific XML format, containing details like buyer and seller information, product specifics, and tax data.

Key Benefits of SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica
Enhanced Compliance: The solution automates NF-e generation in the mandated XML format, minimizing errors and ensuring compliance with Brazilian tax authorities (SEFAZ).
Streamlined Processes: Manual data entry for invoices is significantly reduced, saving time and resources.
Improved Accuracy: Automating invoice creation reduces the risk of errors associated with manual data entry.
Secure Communication: Secure and certified communication with SEFAZ is facilitated through the solution.
Efficiency Gains: Faster invoice processing translates to quicker settlements and improved cash flow.
Important Note: Upcoming End of Maintenance"

It's important to be aware that SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica (SAP NFE) is an on-premise solution nearing its end-of-maintenance date (December 31, 2025). SAP recommends exploring alternative solutions to ensure continued compliance with evolving NF-e regulations.

entry.title: Temu coupon $100 off — {acr897367} or {frg227060}
entry.content:
Get Flat $100 OFF Temu Coupon Code{acr897367} or {frg227060}
→ For All Customers first order Users. You can get a flat $100 off on your first order at Temu using the coupon codes acr897367 or frg227060
". These codes are applicable for all customers on their initial purchase.

A crucial aspect of this is complying with electronic invoicing, mandated by the Nota Fiscal Eletronica (NF-e) system.
